title: Playbook export manifest (v0.1)
description: Sidecar contract for finops-assess playbook JSONL exports. playbook_schema_version '0.1' is additive-only: new top-level keys may be added without a version bump. Consumers MUST ignore unknown keys. A breaking change increments playbook_schema_version to '0.2'. Reader contract: if this file is missing OR output_artifacts.jsonl_sha256 does not match the JSONL on disk, the JSONL is orphaned and MUST NOT be consumed.

playbook_schema_version.description: Schema version. '0.1' for v0.5.0. Bump to '0.2' only on a breaking change.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC ISO-8601 timestamp at second precision. Honours SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH.

path.description: Path to the source report JSON (may be redacted by upstream run).

schema_version.description: schema_version from the source report run block.

pii_redaction.description: Echoes pii_redaction from the source report run block.

row_count.description: Number of rows in the sibling JSONL file.

jsonl_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the sibling JSONL file as written to disk. Consumers MUST verify this before consuming the JSONL.

jsonl_byte_count.description: Byte size of the sibling JSONL file.

mode.description: PII handling mode. 'salted_hash' when PII redaction is on; 'cleartext' when --no-pii-redaction is set.

ticket_key_stability_by_surface.description: Per-surface stability of ticket_key across runs. 'stable' for azure (cleartext resource IDs); 'per_run' for m365/github/ado when PII redaction is on.

surfaces.description: Alphabetically sorted list of cloud surfaces present in this export.

sort_key.description: Human-readable description of the row sort order.

templates_source.description: Describes where the Jinja2 templates were loaded from.
